## Preferred Answer Format

### How I Learn Best
- [ ] Step-by-step explanation
- [ ] Code examples with comments
- [ ] Diagrams or visual representations
- [ ] Analogies and real-world examples
- [ ] Links to resources with guidance on what to focus on
- [ ] Questions that guide me to the answer
- [ ] Other: <!-- Specify -->

### Level of Detail Needed
- [ ] High-level concept overview
- [ ] Detailed technical explanation
- [ ] Both overview and details
- [ ] Just enough to get unstuck

## Response Checklist

<!-- For whoever answers this question -->

- [ ] Understand the question fully
- [ ] Check what student has already tried
- [ ] Provide explanation before code
- [ ] Connect to CSE 2206 concepts
- [ ] Give minimal code examples with TODOs
- [ ] Ask follow-up questions to verify understanding
- [ ] Point to relevant documentation
- [ ] Suggest testing/validation approach
- [ ] Remind about evidence collection
